---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about API surface, CLI flags, config changes, etc.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you evaluated and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, prior art, related issues.
